name: Perseus Computing LLC
capabilities: Persistent memory for AI agents (Perseus Vault)
past_performance: Production-deployed AI infrastructure. Perseus (perseus-ctx) is the live context engine powering Hermes Agent sessions — resolves environment state before every LLM turn. Perseus Vault (formerly Mneme/Mimir) is a persistent memory MCP server with 36+ tools. Both are MIT-licensed and used in production. 1,032 tests in CI, Gauntlet v2 benchmark score 100.0/100.
